ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the booking was made */,
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the business unit that made the booking */,
  "product_family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product family of the booked product */,
  "plid" TEXT /* Unique product ID (PLID) of the booked product */,
  "fiscal_quarter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fiscal quarter of the booking */,
  "fiscal_month_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fiscal month of the booking */,
  "booked_qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product booked */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the booking */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the booking */,
  "quater" INTEGER /* Quarter of the booking */,
  "fiscal_date" TEXT /* Fiscal date of the booking */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price per unit of the booked product */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the booking */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the booking */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales representative who handled the booking */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Scheduled or actual shipping date of the booking */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number associated with the booking */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse from which the product will be shipped */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the booking amount */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of payment for the booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_fiscal_quarter_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_quarter_id") REFERENCES fiscal_quarters ("fiscal_quarter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_product_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_family_id") REFERENCES product_families ("product_family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_business_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_unit_id") REFERENCES business_units ("business_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_fiscal_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_month_id") REFERENCES fiscal_months ("fiscal_month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_units" (
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business unit */,
  "business_unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the business unit */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the business unit */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the business unit */,
  "business_unit_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the business unit */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the business unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the business unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the business unit's information */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the business unit is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_units_business_unit_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_unit_manager_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_families" (
  "product_family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product family */,
  "product_family_name" TEXT /* Name of the product family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product family */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product family */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product family was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product family's information */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product family is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_families_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_quarters" (
  "fiscal_quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal quarter */,
  "fiscal_quarter_name" TEXT /* Name of the fiscal quarter (e.g., Q1 FY2012) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal quarter */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal quarter */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* The fiscal year to which the quarter belongs */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the fiscal quarter is open for bookings */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the fiscal quarter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the fiscal quarter's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fiscal_quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_months" (
  "fiscal_month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal month */,
  "fiscal_month_name" TEXT /* Name of the fiscal month (e.g., AUG FY2012) */,
  "fiscal_quarter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fiscal quarter of the month */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal month */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal month */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the fiscal month is open for bookings */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the fiscal month was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the fiscal month's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fiscal_month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fiscal_months_fiscal_quarter_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_quarter_id") REFERENCES fiscal_quarters ("fiscal_quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the customer's information */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the customer is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_representatives" (
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "sales_rep_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales representative */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the sales representative */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the sales representative */,
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the business unit the sales representative belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sales representative was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sales representative's information */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the sales representative is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the warehouse */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the warehouse */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the warehouse was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the warehouse's information */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the warehouse is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category's information */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
